name_cn:

CABAS TRIOMPHE Canvas Mini Vertical Bag. 🧩65% coated canvas, 35% calfskin, 100% cotton lining, interior slip pocket, adjustable detachable leather shoulder strap 50cm, Dimensions: 17-21-4cm (🔍2200 White Print)
